privileged_info_summary: The underlying meteorological data provided via PySAM's solar_resource directory utilizes real TMY observational datasets. The EPA eGRID 2022 US national average emission factor is correctly identified as 0.3856 metric tons CO2 per MWh. Additionally, the EPA equivalency factors (4.6 metric tons CO2/year per passenger vehicle and 0.060 metric tons CO2/year per tree grown for 10 years) perfectly match the metadata claims. Independent PySAM simulations confirm that a 50kW PV system modeled with these parameters correctly produces an annual yield between 50,000 and 100,000 kWh, directly matching the verifier bounds.
